creator: dmorriso@hes.hmc.psu.edu
text: During initial installation, while files are being copied, I get a dialog that tells me "Unable to transger the xxxxxxx distribution from acdoc. Do want to try to retrieve it again?"  I am installing version 5 on a toshiba laptop and chose the "All" canned distibution and am installing from CD-ROM.  I have 6 partitions set up: /  swap  /var  /tmp  /user  /home.  The "/" partition has 100MB assigned and is the smallest partition.
